zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Basset於1280年出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，她的父親Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton30歲，母親Hawise26歲。她於1298年之前與Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年3月17日在英國瓦維其可爾泰享年57歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Basset于1280年出生在英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，她的父亲Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton30岁，母亲Hawise26岁。她于1298年之前与Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年3月17日在英国瓦維其可爾泰享年57岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾泰。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Basset was born in 1280, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, her father, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, was 30 and her mother, Hawise, was 26. She married Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford before 1298, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 March 1337, in Tysoe, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Tysoe, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Basset est née en 1280, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hawise, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford avant 1298, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1337, à Tysoe, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Tysoe, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Basset 1280 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton 30 und ihre Mutter Hawise 26. Sie hat vor 1298 in Staffordshire, England Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. März 1337 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Tysoe, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Tysoe, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Basset è nata il nel 1280 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Hawise, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford prima del 1298, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1337, nel Tysoe, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Tysoe, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bassetが1280年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Draytonは30歳，母Hawiseは26歳であった。1298年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでEdmund Stafford 1st Baron Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年3月17日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアトイソで57歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアトイソにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Basset(이)가 1280년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1298년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 3월 17일 영국 워윅실르 타이소에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 타이소에 묻혔다.

mn.Sandon, Pirehill, Staffordshire, England: Sandon, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Basset nasceu em 1280, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Hawise, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford antes 1298, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1337, em Tysoe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Tysoe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Basset родилась в 1280 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford перед 1298 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 марта 1337 г. в местности тисо, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности тисо, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Basset nació en 1280, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Hawise, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford antes de 1298, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1337, en Tysoe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Tysoe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
